capability: the novelty reserve tracks the recent RATE of newcomers (signal-derived, not a constant)
claim: a newcomer into a SETTLED context is far more surprising than the same newcomer into a CHURNING context; a constant reserve, blind to novelty history, scores the two matched-mass contexts identically
stimulus_shape: matched-mass churn vs confirmation unit streams + newcomer probe + loud-surface control
mechanism: noveltyAmplitude = Σ γ^(at-1-j) over first-appearances j<at, fed as the `novelty` amplitude through the UNCHANGED Born step reserve=novelty/(Σmass+novelty); context enters at the amplitude, the law is untouched
layer: interior (src/core/surprise.js noveltyAmplitude) + two front-ends (src/perceiver/reading.js text figure+proposition channels, src/surfer/sequence.js n-gram continuation)
gate: opts.adaptiveNovelty default OFF; suite byte-identical at 655 green; omnimodal gate met — two senses show the same behaviour

holds: the significance channel the surfer cursor and enacted loop ride
not_yet: the music move reserve in src/predict/recurrence.js (Laplace +1, untouched)
the default path (flag off until promoted behind a golden)

capability: the impulse (shock) threshold is fit to the reader's own scale, not an absolute constant
claim: the spec named an absolute 0.95 impulse gate as a dead threshold that never fires on the compressed meaning scale; the fix is a high quantile of the reader's own surprise distribution
verdict: ALREADY-CLOSED — no fix needed, gap diagnosed as resolved
mechanism: DEFAULT_IMPULSE_QUANTILE=0.98 with a causal nearest-rank quantile fit from `seen` (past surprises only); the 0.95 constant remains ONLY as the cold-start fallback below IMPULSE_MIN_SAMPLES (16)
layer: interior (already landed in a prior pass)
next_target: src/predict/recurrence.js — the music move reserve still uses Laplace +1, not a γ-decayed novelty rate; a live instance of the same constant hunt for a future cycle

capability: the novelty-reserve fix generalizes from synthetic streams to real parsed prose
claim: on prose read through the full parser (admission gate, coref, relations), a newcomer into a settled stretch is more surprising than into a churn — the same dissociation, not an artifact of synthetic INS logs
stimulus_shape: domain-injected sultanate prose (Johor Sultanate seed): 7 distinct rulers vs 1 ruler elaborated, then a newcomer
mechanism: same as cycle-0001 — the text front-end builds the proposition field from real parse events; the recipe is unchanged
gate: instrument verified at the event level: CHURN admitted 7 distinct figures, SETTLED admitted 2; flag-off Δ=0 (still blind on prose), flag-on Δbayes=0.87, ΔsurprisalBits=3.21

holds: real parsed prose with named entities through the admission gate
not_yet: prose where the two-sighting admission gate suppresses single-mention newcomers — the front-end interaction is untested

fitness: a third independent pressure improved by the one mechanism — prefer the fix that lifts several pressures to the one that lifts one
